sales_page_raw: Machine Learning Specialization by Andrew Ng. Master AI and ML fundamentals. Price: $49/month or free via audit mode. Syllabus covers linear regression, neural networks, decision trees, and unsupervised learning.

youtube_search.title: Andrew Ng Stanford ML Lectures Playlist
youtube_search.description: Full lecture series of Andrew Ng Machine Learning CS229.

transcripts.ng_vid_1: Welcome to CS229. Today we cover supervised learning, cost function, and gradient descent. This is a fully structured course syllabus with notebooks and exercises.

web_search.title: Andrew Ng - Stanford Faculty Profile
web_search.snippet: Andrew Ng is an Adjunct Professor at Stanford University and co-founder of Coursera and DeepLearning.AI.
